title: Living with Water: A Resilient Urban Framework
description: The project addresses Surat’s flooding challenges by transforming low-lying areas into multifunctional landscapes that store runoff while providing parks and community spaces. Using bioswales, riparian buffers, and rainwater harvesting, it integrates ecological restoration and adaptive public programming to create a sustainable, flood-resilient urban environment.
shortDescription: An adaptive Urban Water Management Plan.

title: Surat 2035-Strategic Urban Growth Assessment
description: A comprehensive development plan for Surat prepared through parametric analysis of the city’s existing urban fabric, land use, and regulations. The project explored innovative zoning approaches and redefined development regulations to address urban challenges. The proposals aimed to create an adaptive, sustainable, and inclusive framework for Surat’s future growth.
shortDescription: Surat Urban Development Authority (SUDA) required an assessment for the city as part of its 2035 development plan.

title: Downtown Urban Revitalization
description: A comprehensive master plan to revitalize the downtown core, focusing on pedestrian-friendly streetscapes, public plazas, and mixed-use development to foster a vibrant community.
shortDescription: Master plan for downtown revitalization and public spaces.

title: Riverside Healthcare Hub
description: State-of-the-art healthcare facility designed with patient well-being in mind. Incorporates natural light, green spaces, and efficient patient flow systems.
shortDescription: Patient-centric healthcare facility with green spaces.

title: Eco-Living Residences
description: Sustainable residential complex featuring passive cooling, solar integration, and community gardens, setting a new standard for urban living.

title: Tech Park Plaza
description: A modern commercial development providing flexible workspaces, retail outlets, and expansive public areas that encourage collaboration and networking.
shortDescription: Modern commercial development and tech park.

title: Coastal Regional Plan
description: Strategic landuse framework for a growing coastal region, balancing economic development with environmental conservation and climate resilience.
shortDescription: Strategic framework balancing development and conservation.

title: Urban Transit GIS Mapping
description: Comprehensive GIS spatial analysis to optimize proposed public transit routes and assess environmental and demographic impacts.
shortDescription: Spatial analysis for optimizing public transit infrastructure.
